title: limeum viscosum var. kenyense
intro: Limeum viscosum var. kenyense, also known as the sticky Limeum or Kenyan sticky Limeum, is a plant species belonging to the Limeum genus, which is often used for its medicinal and therapeutic properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to various health benefits such as wound healing, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Limeum viscosum var. kenyense include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are commonly made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by extracting its essential oils, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to promote overall well-being.
